children.text: a participating jurisdiction has been adjudicated, by a Federal, State, or local court, to be in violation of title VI of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 [ et seq.], the Fair Housing Act [ et seq.], or any other Federal, State, or local law promoting fair housing or prohibiting discrimination, or42 U.S.C. 2000d42 U.S.C. 3601
a settlement has been entered into in any case where claims of such violations have been asserted against a participating jurisdiction, except to the extent permitted by subsection (b).

children.heading: Remedial use of funds permitted
children.label: b Remedial use of funds permitted
children.text: In the case of settlement described in subsection (a)(2), a jurisdiction may use funds provided under this Act to carry out housing remedies with eligible activities.
